name: Creamy Scalloped Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 can Cream of Mushroom Soup (10 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and thinly slice the potatoes.
2. Toss the potato slices in 1 cup water and 1/2 teaspoon cream of tartar. Drain well.
3. Place half of the sliced potatoes in a greased Crock-POT.
4. Top with half of the onion slices, flour, salt, and pepper.
5. Add the remaining sliced potatoes and onions.
6. Sprinkle with the remaining flour.
7. Add butter and undiluted soup to the Crock-POT.
8. Cover and cook on Low for 7-9 hours (or High for 3-4 hours).
9. Add cheese slices 30 minutes before serving. The recipe can be doubled for a 5-quart model.
